content: Serana: You Stormcloak bitches should really invest in better security. Just sucked dry some pathetic thief trying to smuggle poison into the Black-Briar mead. Tasted like desperation and bad life choices. Reminds me of the last time I throat-fucked a Bandit Chief while MJR watched... lasted about as long as your so-called rebellion. Riften Guard: Oh fuck off, vampire whore. At least we don’t deepthroat gargoyles like your kind. And how’s that imperial cock taste? Bet you swallow every lie the Legion feeds you along with MJR’s- Serana: Darling, I’ve taken more than just MJR down my throat. Ever tried fitting an entire Daedric mace in there? Dibella’s tits, the looks on those Vigilants' faces when I gagged on Molag Bal’s artifact before slaughtering them... priceless. purity Riften Guard: enlightened Serana: Threaten me again and I’ll turn your precious Jarl into my personal bloodbag. Besides... we both know you’ve fantasized about MJR bending you over this very guard rail. Admit it—you’ve touched yourself imagining his calloused hands squeezing those Stormcloak-branded tits while he rails you like a whiterun draft horse. Riften Guard: I’ll fucking kill y— Serana: Darling! Tell this uptight milk-drinker how my tongue outperforms her entire lineage. Unless you’d prefer a demonstration right here against the fishery wall? Dibella knows these guards could use some... cultural reeducation.

Riften Guard: Ugh, keep your vampire perversions away from the fishery walls. Last thing we need is your undead fluids scaring off the fish. Serana: Oh, don’t pretend you’re not curious—I can hear your heartbeat pick up just thinking about it. But fine, I’ll save my talents for someone who... appreciates them. Maybe I’ll go find MJR and remind him why he prefers fangs over prudish militia girls. Riften Guard: Go lick a gargoyle, freak.
